promoted_facts.fact: Operations Manual is 733 pages covering 18 topics, equipment section alone is 214 pages
Franchise Advisory Council has 24 members selected by Sonic plus 3 Task Groups with 69 members serving 3-year terms
2,093 of 3,057 franchised restaurants (68%) operate with drive-thru windows
Texas had 110 transfers in 2024, the highest single-state total — nearly 1/3 of all transfers that year
Georgia dramatic decline from 77 franchised (2023) to 49 (2025) — 21 ceased other reasons in 2024
BTF (Brand Technology Fund) dissolved at end of fiscal 2025, had received $41.6M from suppliers
FA remodeling limited to once every 7 years, not within first 3 years unless standards change
1-year limitations period for bringing claims (FA Section 22.04)
Jury trial waiver is mutual (FA Section 22.03)
3+ defaults in 12 months (whether cured) is a non-curable termination trigger
